summary: Saved scans reload from an optimised snapshot; incompatible data clears automatically on first launch.
introduced: Compact launch snapshots store overview, top consumers, and analysis for instant reload on startup
System health profiling runs during startup so the menu bar score appears immediately
changed: Uninterrupted startup loading applies saved scans automatically without showing the prompt
Main window stays hidden until launch overlays finish, including the saved-scan prompt when needed
Duplicate groups load in the background after the snapshot restores
fixed: Saved-scan prompt no longer beach-balls while the main UI, analysis, and menu bar health profiling initialize
First launch on 0.5.6 clears incompatible saved-scan data with a highlighted startup message
